pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Automated deployment with infrastructure as code. aws-subnet_atomic follows IaC best practices.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Follows security best practices with proper IAM roles and network isolation where applicable.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: Optimized for performance with appropriate resource sizing and configuration.

pillars.title: Cost
pillars.description: Cost-optimized with appropriate resource sizing and managed services.

pillars.title: Sustainability
pillars.description: Uses cloud-managed services for efficient resource utilization and reduced carbon footprint.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Designed for reliability with appropriate redundancy and fault tolerance.
